data.title: Ethereum Spot ETFs Show No Net Change on April 17
data.description:
According to Foresight News, data from SoSoValue indicates that on April 17, nine Ethereum spot ETFs experienced no net inflows or outflows, maintaining a zero-change status throughout the day.

As of the latest report, the total net asset value of Ethereum spot ETFs stands at $5.269 billion. The net asset ratio, which compares the market value to Ethereum's total market capitalization, is at 2.76%. Historically, the cumulative net inflow has reached $2.244 billion.

data.title: The whale who lost more than $700,000 on Fartcoin bought 2.22 million tokens again, and now has a loss of $297,000
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Lookonchain monitoring, a whale who once lost $701,000 in Fartcoin trading spent another 14,725 SOL (1.98 million US dollars) to buy 2.22 million Fartcoin at an average price of $0.89. His current loss is $297,000.

data.title: Ethereum spot ETF had zero inflow yesterday
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (April 17, Eastern Time), none of the nine Ethereum spot ETFs had net inflows or net outflows throughout the day, showing a zero change state.
As of press time, the total net asset value of the Ethereum spot ETF was US$5.269 billion, and the ETF net asset ratio (market value to the total market value of Ethereum) reached 2.76%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached US$2.244 billion.

data.title: Lending protocol Dolomite will hold TGE on April 24
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Multi-chain lending protocol Dolomite will hold a DOLO token generation event (TGE) on April 24. The total supply of DOLO tokens is 1 billion, and the circulation at the time of TGE is about 361 million (including locked veDOLO). The airdrop snapshot was completed on January 6, 2025. 
Previous news, Dolomite will launch DOLO tokens on Berachain, and 20% will be airdropped to community members.

data.title: Bitcoin spot ETFs had a total net inflow of $108 million yesterday, and none of the twelve ETFs had a net outflow
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (April 17, Eastern Time), the total net inflow of Bitcoin spot ETFs was US$108 million.
The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest net inflow in a single day yesterday was BlackRock Bitcoin ETF IBIT, with a single-day net inflow of US$80.9588 million. Currently, IBIT's total net inflow has reached US$39.754 billion. The second is Fidelity Bitcoin ETF FBTC, with a single-day net inflow of US$25.9049 million. Currently, FBTC's total net inflow has reached US$11.282 billion. As of press time, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETFs is US$94.507 billion, and the ETF net asset ratio (market value to total Bitcoin market value) is 5.59%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached US$35.375 billion.

data.title: U.S. Bitcoin Reserve Predicted to Have 52% Chance by 2025
data.description: According to Odaily, users on the prediction platform Polymarket estimate a 52% likelihood that the United States will establish a Bitcoin reserve by 2025.

data.title: VanEck NODE ETF Approved, Set for May Launch
data.description:
VanEck's NODE ETF, approved by the SEC, targets digital asset stocks like Coinbase. Launch set for May 14.
source: https://coincu.com/332851-vaneck-node-etf-may-launch

data.title: Polymarket reports that the probability of the United States establishing Bitcoin reserves by 2025 is 52%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Polymarket users' predictions, the United States has a 52% chance of establishing Bitcoin reserves in 2025.

data.title: Synthetix founder changed his personal username to kain.depeg (depegging)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Synthetix founder Kain has changed the username of his personal X account to kain.depeg (depeg).
In addition, Kain said in response to the community's question about sUSD depegging: "No one wants to see depegging happen, and there are currently multiple solutions under study."
According to previous news, sUSD continued to depeg. According to Parsec analysis, the recent depegging of Synthetix stablecoin sUSD was not due to bad debt or protocol failure, but a side effect of the SIP-420 mechanism adjustment. SIP-420 introduces a shared debt pool mechanism. SNX pledgers no longer mint sUSD alone and assume personal debts, but entrust funds to the public pool, thereby achieving a structure without liquidation and personal debt. However, when the sUSD price deviates from the anchor value, the pledger no longer has the motivation to repurchase sUSD at a low price to repay the debt, and the original self-regulation mechanism of the protocol fails.

data.title: LINK's market value exceeds that of the New York Times, reaching $8.25 billion
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Cointelegraph’s article on the X platform, the market value of Chainlink token LINK has surpassed The New York Times. The current market value of LINK is $8.25 billion, and the market value of The New York Times Company is $8.04 billion.
